results.rendered_html:
girvāhas (gir + vāhas) adj. dem Anrufungen dargebracht werden, besungen, von Indra: gīrbhirgirvāha stavamāna ā gahi  ṚV. 1,139,6 . giraśca girvāhase suvṛktīndrāya 61,4 . 30,5 . 6,21,2 . 24,6 . 8,2,30 . 85,10 . vom Wagen der Aśvin 4,44,1 .
— Vgl. satyagirvāhas.
